pages.title: Bound, not held
pages.text: Stasis tools are the Arsenal's endgame set — diamond-tier, auto-repairing, and bound to their wielder. Each is forged on a $(item)Stasis Plate$() by $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/altare)Sanguine Infusion$(), fusing a bound component with the matching diamond implement.$(br2)Once bound, a stasis tool draws LP from the $(l:bloodmagic:altar/soul_network)Soul Network$() when used — the wielder never pays durability.

pages.title: Stasis Plate
pages.text: A placed block. Drop an eligible tool onto it with the right components arrayed around it, and the plate performs the binding. Unlike the altare, the plate is recipe-specific — one plate, one tool family.

pages.title: Stasis Sword
pages.text: Bound from a $(item)Warp Blade$() or $(item)Stygian Dagger$() + diamond sword. Carries the parent weapon's quirks forward into an indestructible frame.

pages.title: Stasis Pickaxe
pages.text: Bound from a $(item)Blood-Infused Iron Pickaxe$() and diamond pickaxe. A daily-driver mining tool with no durability ceiling.

pages.title: Stasis Axe
pages.text: Bound from a $(item)Blood-Infused Iron Axe$() and diamond axe.

pages.title: Stasis Shovel
pages.text: Bound from a $(item)Blood-Infused Iron Shovel$() and diamond shovel.
